Optimiste Park

Photos

Address: 43 Ste. Cécile Street, Ottawa, ON

Features

  • Baby swing

Accessibility and amenities

  • Accessibility: Accessible swing
  • Surface: Mulch
  • Parking: No

Notes

Bathroom and water fountain at Genest Pool. Merry-go-round style playground equipment
